label: Buildable Def
description: Intermediate abstract type for defs that can be placed or built. Inherits from Def.

statBases.label: Stat bases
statBases.description: Map of stat names to their base values. Child element names are stat defNames.

passability.label: Passability
passability.description: Controls whether pawns and projectiles can pass through the thing.

pathCost.label: Path cost
pathCost.description: Additional movement cost applied when a pawn walks through the thing's cell.

pathCostIgnoreRepeat.label: Path cost ignore repeat
pathCostIgnoreRepeat.description: If true, the path cost is not applied when a pawn passes through the same type of thing repeatedly in one path.

fertility.label: Fertility
fertility.description: Fertility modifier applied to the terrain beneath this thing. -1 means no override.

costList.label: Cost list
costList.description: Materials consumed when constructing this thing. Each child element is a ThingDef defName with a count.

costStuffCount.label: Cost stuff count
costStuffCount.description: Amount of the chosen stuff material required to build this thing.

stuffCategories.label: Stuff categories
stuffCategories.description: StuffCategoryDef references listing which stuff materials this thing can be built from.

stuffCategorySummary.label: Stuff category summary
stuffCategorySummary.description: Optional override text summarizing the allowed stuff categories shown in the UI.

costListForDifficulty.label: Cost list for difficulty
costListForDifficulty.description: Conditional cost list applied based on a difficulty variable at construction time.

drawStyleCategory.label: Draw style category
drawStyleCategory.description: DrawStyleCategoryDef that controls which visual style variants are available for this thing.

clearBuildingArea.label: Clear building area
clearBuildingArea.description: Whether the construction blueprint clears items from the footprint before building starts.

defaultPlacingRot.label: Default placing rotation
defaultPlacingRot.description: Initial rotation shown when the player selects this thing for placement.

resourcesFractionWhenDeconstructed.label: Resources fraction when deconstructed
resourcesFractionWhenDeconstructed.description: Fraction of construction materials returned when this thing is deconstructed.

blocksAltitudes.label: Blocks altitudes
blocksAltitudes.description: Altitude layers that this thing blocks for other things trying to occupy the same cell.

dominantStyleCategory.label: Dominant style category
dominantStyleCategory.description: StyleCategoryDef that this building belongs to for style-related quests and requirements.

forcePassableByFlyingPawns.label: Force passable by flying pawns
forcePassableByFlyingPawns.description: If true, flying pawns can always pass through this thing regardless of its passability.

forceMoveItemsBeforeConstruction.label: Force move items before construction
forceMoveItemsBeforeConstruction.description: If true, any items in the footprint must be moved before construction can begin.

isAltar.label: Is altar
isAltar.description: If true, this building is treated as an altar for ritual and ideoligion purposes.

useStuffTerrainAffordance.label: Use stuff terrain affordance
useStuffTerrainAffordance.description: If true, the terrain affordance requirement is determined by the chosen stuff material.

terrainAffordanceNeeded.label: Terrain affordance needed
terrainAffordanceNeeded.description: TerrainAffordanceDef that the underlying terrain must provide for this thing to be placed.

buildingPrerequisites.label: Building prerequisites
buildingPrerequisites.description: ThingDef references for buildings that must exist on the map before this thing can be constructed.

discoveryPrerequisites.label: Discovery prerequisites
discoveryPrerequisites.description: ThingDef references that must have been discovered before this thing can be built.

researchPrerequisites.label: Research prerequisites
researchPrerequisites.description: ResearchProjectDef references that must be completed before this thing can be built.

minMonolithLevel.label: Min monolith level
minMonolithLevel.description: Minimum monolith activation level required before this thing can be built.

constructionSkillPrerequisite.label: Construction skill prerequisite
constructionSkillPrerequisite.description: Minimum Construction skill level a pawn needs to build this thing.

artisticSkillPrerequisite.label: Artistic skill prerequisite
artisticSkillPrerequisite.description: Minimum Artistic skill level a pawn needs to build this thing.

minTechLevelToBuild.label: Min tech level to build
minTechLevelToBuild.description: Minimum faction tech level required to construct this thing.

maxTechLevelToBuild.label: Max tech level to build
maxTechLevelToBuild.description: Maximum faction tech level that is permitted to construct this thing.

requireInspectedGravEngine.label: Require inspected grav engine
requireInspectedGravEngine.description: If true, a gravity engine must have been inspected before this thing can be constructed.

altitudeLayer.label: Altitude layer
altitudeLayer.description: Rendering layer that controls draw order relative to other things.

repairEffect.label: Repair effect
repairEffect.description: EffecterDef played at this thing's location while it is being repaired.

constructEffect.label: Construct effect
constructEffect.description: EffecterDef played at this thing's location while it is being constructed.

colorPerStuff.label: Color per stuff
colorPerStuff.description: Overrides the tint color of this thing when built from a specific stuff material.

canGenerateDefaultDesignator.label: Can generate default designator
canGenerateDefaultDesignator.description: If false, the game will not auto-generate a build designator for this thing in the Architect menu.

ideoBuilding.label: Ideo building
ideoBuilding.description: If true, this building is an ideoligion building that can be assigned as a style-required structure.

specialDisplayRadius.label: Special display radius
specialDisplayRadius.description: Radius of the effect circle drawn around this thing when it is selected or hovered.

placeWorkers.label: Place workers
placeWorkers.description: List of C# class names (PlaceWorker subclasses) that run placement validation logic.

designationCategory.label: Designation category
designationCategory.description: DesignationCategoryDef that controls which build menu tab this thing appears in.

designatorDropdown.label: Designator dropdown
designatorDropdown.description: DesignatorDropdownGroupDef that groups this thing with others in a collapsed dropdown in the build menu.

designationHotKey.label: Designation hot key
designationHotKey.description: KeyBindingDef reference for the keyboard shortcut that activates the build designation for this thing.

uiOrder.label: UI order
uiOrder.description: Floating-point sort key controlling the position of this thing within its designation category.

uiIconPath.label: UI icon path
uiIconPath.description: Texture path for the icon shown in the build menu for this thing. Defaults to the main graphic texture.

uiIconPathsStuff.label: UI icon paths stuff
uiIconPathsStuff.description: Per-stuff-appearance icon overrides shown in the build menu.

uiIconOffset.label: UI icon offset
uiIconOffset.description: Pixel offset applied to the build menu icon.

uiIconColor.label: UI icon color
uiIconColor.description: Tint color applied to the build menu icon.

uiIconColorTwo.label: UI icon color two
uiIconColorTwo.description: Second tint color applied to the build menu icon mask.

uiIconForStackCount.label: UI icon for stack count
uiIconForStackCount.description: Stack count at which the alternate stack-count icon is shown. -1 disables the feature.
